success_factors: End-to-end workflow status is success with all expected nodes executed (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-based adapter mode was feasible for this repository (import feasibility 0.93, low intrusiveness risk).
Generated MCP plugin booted successfully and health checks passed over stdio transport.
Repository structure is rich and discoverable via AST/package scan, enabling automated endpoint extraction.
failure_reasons: No hard execution failures were reported (errors and warnings are empty).
Quality gap: original project test validation is effectively absent in this run (passed=false, empty details/files), reducing confidence in semantic correctness.
DeepWiki enrichment failed, so architecture/context quality relies on direct static analysis only.

node_performance.download_time: Repository ingestion completed successfully via zip fallback; appears efficient for a 567-file codebase.
node_performance.analysis_time: Static analysis completed with broad symbol discovery; likely the dominant phase due to very large API surface.
node_performance.generation_time: Plugin generation completed quickly with standard MCP scaffold files; however, metadata indicates LOC/size/tool counts were not captured accurately.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin smoke execution passed, but original project tests were not meaningfully executed, leaving a validation blind spot.
